description_long: This object is a large, rectangular solar energy infrastructure installation featuring a grid of photovoltaic panels mounted on a robust, metallic platform. The surface is predominantly covered with dark, grid-patterned solar cells, interspersed with several raised, block-like structures that likely serve as supports or housings for electrical components. The platform is bordered by metallic edges and includes a few recessed and elevated sections, possibly for maintenance access or structural reinforcement. The overall design is industrial, with a combination of smooth and ribbed surfaces, and the panels are set at a shallow angle to maximize sunlight exposure. The structure appears to be intended for ground installation, with a flat base and no visible wheels or mobility features. The color palette is mainly black, gray, and metallic silver, with some reflective surfaces indicating glass or polished metal.
description: A large, rectangular solar panel array on a metallic platform with grid-patterned photovoltaic cells and several raised support structures. The installation features a mix of smooth and ribbed surfaces in black, gray, and metallic tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grid of solar panels with raised blocks and metallic borders most prominently, highlighting the main surface and support structures.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the flatness of the platform, the shallow tilt of the panels, and the distribution of raised blocks along the surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back edge of the platform, additional raised structures, and the continuation of the grid pattern across the surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the length of the installation, the arrangement of the panels, and the symmetry of the support blocks.
attribute_panel_orientation: tilted at approximately 10 degrees, orientation appears fixed
attribute_mounting_structure_type: ground-mounted with metallic (likely aluminum) frame and support blocks
attribute_array_configuration: single large grid of panels, approximately 2x6 configuration
